message.body: i just realized the nametag says Viridian even though the boss is Vermilion
was this also in the og
OG as in OG K2 yeah lol
but barfy checked and diverse had it right
we can conclude from this that influka is color blind
i thought maybe id like this boss more on day 2 after i had some time to rest
but instead i hate it day 2
The boss sucks, the sequel, the boss sucks 2 : suckmaster suckstreme
they should have full committed to the K3 reference and completely remade the boss to be an avoidance to Next Stage instead
2nd best option to not making the boss an avoidance in the first place
that attack seems kinda fucked up
Yeah you can just get fucked
is pochi the final "intermission" (idk a better word for them)
you couldnt have spawned those stars anywhere else sir
Died of a heart attack I guess
yeah pochi is the final cutaway
ending is just a bunch of tough RNG attacks
i fucked it with that single jump
and i had some crazy dodges
that attack goes so much longer than i expect it to
and theres no reason to go down early but i get scared
god get me the fuck outta there
also i had 2 really funny moments in that clear
hol up we gotta look at the dumb spots
glad i got to watch for like 5 minutes and witness the clear haha
im giving yuka so much ad revenue
humanoid kermit seems like a menace
yeah pochi is tough but probably the most fun cutaway
should i keep playing a bit idk
i mean if you are having fun / feel like going more
oh no ew why did they secret 5-ify this
thats the point of the game wolskCola
i mean the warped part sure, but not the secret 5 part right
(i have not seen much of the actual gameplay)
every stage has a gimmick from K3 stage 5
so this stage will be secret 5
is every screen have you walking through it with no obstacles first
im gonna guess the answer is yes
disappointed that they didn't put the number from the galaxy path block on a secret 5 block
no idea where the energy is gonna be
is there energy in every room?
clearly it'll be where the crystal in secret 5 was
nal made a guide of which screens had them because im not dealing with searching every well and crevice when there are no hints or indicators
can you easily go to every screen later or would you have to replay everything
well first you'd have to get secret 5
yeah once you beat the game you can warp to any screen from some computer thingy
which i'll need since i didnt have a guide for stage 1 or 2
i had an idea where it would be cool to hide it
having to walk through the full empty corridor every time
look how they massacred my boy
well that is.... better than the alternative
good to find that trap early i guess
i somehow just didnt see the warp lmao
well it's all the spikes that move in the original GB'
but my brain cant remember them in this format LMAO
bruh my playing today is not
yeah this one wont be awesome
no shot i remember these triggers
a he he he ho ho he he he he ho ho ho
this screen has the most unmemorable traps in the world
i was wondering when that bitch was gonna move
is that one that moves in the original too=
yep all of these screens use the original traps
was probably down one of the loser pits
or you had to do another loop
oh gg you beat the wall
also judging from chat it sounds like you had the same experience i did with device
i truly could not handle that screen lol
i handled device better than i handled GB honestly
i was a mess on GB
oh true that screen is surprisingly hard too
this stage has been cool for the most part
outside device, which wasn't really the gimmicks fault
i can't believe they'd require you do that
oh right i think i saw energy here in the video?
i really like the explorer screen mainly cause the bottom row is funny
right when i saw the screen i knew itd make me do the avoidance multiple times lol
rumour has it nobody has beaten this screen
you're supposed to pass through the fake fruit to win
the kid on the top is delayed by a frame
it felt like i was playing with input delay because i basically was
so nal why does it say kill the guy twice. is that where it jumps up by 2%?
just do 1 first, then you'll understand the other
PYF is the only 2% jump i saw, still confused by it
i'm not convinced there isn't one in dieary, but i feel like i explored it a lot when i first played and got nothing
i cant tell if im dumb or this is insane
but at the very least this screen is extremely not clear
do you remember a friend in ktg?
i dont know what that means so im going with no
you can stand on the bullet bills
wait but i thought i landed on one and died
i guess i just landed near the front
the front kills, i didn't see what you did
AND CAPS LOCK MADE ME ANGRY
pretty sure its in k2r too
i messed up that section in so many ways lol
i kinda of just dont like any version of geezer that exists and i cant imagine this is the game to change my mind lol
considering how you feel about the k2 bosses i'm almost surprised you started this
@Wolsk dang can't believe you're denouncing friendship with geezer, the person, live on twitch
not even just the bosses nal wolskCola i just dont like K2
the thing thats confusing me about the bats is that they bounce from the center instead of using the full sprite
it makes it hard to know where and when theyre bouncing
k2 hater plays k2 if it was russian k3...
so skull, what inspired the recent steam excursion...
realized i dont have like half of ofr added
what inspired this k2 warped excursion, wolsk
okay so the buff to the avoidance is that there are no platforms
i thought you might be able to inf jump
but i didnt see any indicator which is highly questionable
do u like it any better than k2
does koala area have any inf jump indicator?
i thought in koala you just kinda have it
been a long time since i played it
god these bats are such a mess lol
oh i didnt even piece it together that that was supposed to be koala
imagine if bats were like that in every zelda game
yeah you didn't really get much time to see the miku
although the tileset is also koala
oh boss 2 is meant to be lunarmagic?
it's every stage 5 thing buddy, not just the platforming
although that does mean boss 1 is like simon says or something idk lol
im about to file this shit rn
surprised you don't have an adblock
not using adblock in this economy is crazy
it just doesnt work for me on win7
huh I guess that is the lunarmagic tileset
they should have at least added the sdvx effects
i still have it on win10
it restricted what they can do
boss 3 was doruppi as you can imagine
wait what part of boss 3 was doruppi
the tileset at least, idk on the rest
okay yeah nothing about boss 2 is lunarmagic thats literally just miku bro
i'm not sure what really got lunarmagic'd for the fight either
ok but i said the tileset not the miku
or do you mean the tileset???
ok i didn't say that earlier i'm a liar
the next couple will be a hell of a lot clearer
i can't tell of luka forcing the avoidance is cause doruppi avoidance, k2r achievement, or both
probably just since it was cleaner that way
most people end up playing like 90% of the fight in k2r anyway
is the heaventrap phase basically required in k2r? i forget if they changed anything
iirc heaventrap phase is required and pochi you can skip
thats how i remember it too
you have NO IDEA how mad i am there's no energy in color
first try half of the avoidance and the entire ending is SO dumb
came up with like 5 different cool spots and none of them get used
my heart is pounding like crazy
last energy i needed was in blood festival and is just the lamest grab in the world
alright 1 single attempt, but im doing this on main stream probably
because i think i'll like this stage
i can't believe you didn't think secret 5 would be peak
it was probably my favorite stage so far
i can't tell what that means
honestly a lot of really good screens considering... what it's based off
i especially liked the reverse controls one
the platforming they had to work with was a lot better here
yeah that reverse one is one of my favourites
alright well that was fun. thanks for watching. im proud of that geezer clear lmao
im gonna go watch it back and then sleep
lets confuse him with a yuka raid
